title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Instamojo

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Instamojo
jsonLd.description:
We at Instamojo are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Instamojo:
Instamojo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo!
